  <radialGradient id="hvOrbit" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff4488" stop-opacity="0.6"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#cc1144" stop-opacity="0.2"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#880022" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>
  <radialGradient id="hvShadow" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#000" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#000" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>

</defs>
